privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated prospective memory (PM) dataset containing 20 valid participants and 1 explicitly contaminated participant ('sub-99'). The contaminated participant is generated with impossible uniform reaction times between 20.0 and 30.0 ms to simulate an automated macro. The expected output JSON report is correctly verified as /home/ga/pebl/analysis/pm_report.json, and the verifier accurately assesses PM cost and Hit Rate logic against the dataset.
